query:
-- Project-linked manual contacts WITHOUT emails on hot/warm projects — need Apollo to find emails
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as contacts_needing_email,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as projects
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' 
  AND c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email = '')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold');
